title: Filipino-Style Stir Fry with Crunchy Peanuts
description: A flavorful stir fry dish from the Philippines, featuring crunchy peanuts and a creamy sauce. This recipe is easy to prepare and can be enjoyed with rice or noodles.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and sauté until tender.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the chopped peanuts and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and stir well to combine.
Add the soy sauce (if using) and stir well to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with chopped peanuts and a sprinkle of salt (optional).
